chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1877 of 2020 CP D 1712 of 2020 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.9227/2021. 2. For hearing of main case. 27.03.2025 Mr. Zia-ul-Hassan, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Khalid Rajpar, advocate for the respondents. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General. Learned counsel for the respondent department states that impugned notices shall be withdrawn forthwith subject to the right of department to initiate any fresh proceedings as may be permissible under the law. Learned counsel for the petitioners states that in view of foregoing, these petitions have served their purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place a copy hereof in the connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
